Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

latest refresh fails build on current 3.15 kernel in fc20.  errors:

  CC [M]  /home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs/osd_io.o
/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs/osd_io.c: In function ‘dio_complete_routine’:
/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs/osd_io.c:184:31: error: subscripted value is neither array nor pointer nor vector
     SetPageUptodate(bvec_iter_page(bvl, iter));
                               ^
/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs/osd_io.c:185:56: error: subscripted value is neither array nor pointer nor vector
    LASSERT(PageLocked(bvec_iter_page(bvl, iter)));
                                                        ^
make[6]: *** [/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs/osd_io.o] Error 1
make[5]: *** [/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre/osd-ldiskfs] Error 2
make[4]: *** [/home/bogl/lustre-release/lustre] Error 2
make[3]: *** [_module_/home/bogl/lustre-release] Error 2
make[3]: Leaving directory `/home/bogl/rb/BUILD/kernel-3.15.6.200.l0721'
make[2]: *** [modules] Error 2
make[2]: Leaving directory `/home/bogl/lustre-release'
make[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
make[1]: Leaving directory `/home/bogl/lustre-release'
make: *** [all] Error 2

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

my bad. previous bad results that I reported were due to my building incorrectly. after carefully rebuilding the build is fine.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

no, wrong again.  build on fc20 does really fail exactly as previously reported. It appears to be quite unhappy about the args for bvec_iter_page() in the case where HAVE_BVEC_ITER is #define'd.

parents.subject: LU-5200 llite: Cmp of unsigned value against 0 is always true

commit.subject: LU-4993 osd-ldiskfs: Support 3.14 kernel changes to bio api
commit.message:
LU-4993 osd-ldiskfs: Support 3.14 kernel changes to bio api

In the 3.14 kernel code base several data fields in
struct bio were moved into a new structure called
bvec_iter. This patch updates osd-ldiskfs to handle
this api change.

Change-Id: I849a1d62462c58a79766c176060b27c621627646
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10995
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
